name: specialty trade contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For specialty trade contractors processing 5–15 invoices/month, poor project tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide streamlined progress tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to effectively track project progress and report accurately.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to effectively track project progress and report accurately.
